rationale: The citing study focuses on in-store unplanned consideration incidence/conversion using video tracking and latent category utility models, while the cited paper centers on power distance belief, self-control, and vice/virtue impulsive buying mechanisms—constructs not reflected in the citing paper’s focal constructs or findings. With only one DOI-level match and no quoted in-text context indicating direct theory/method use, the citation appears to be a peripheral background mention in the broader unplanned/impulsive buying literature.
